ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the facility */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the facility's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the facility's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the facility can accommodate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for facility-related queries */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for facility-related queries */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, facility manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the booking (e.g., lecture, meeting, exam) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility requiring maintenance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member assigned to handle the request */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was completed */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the user who submitted the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of facilities of this type */,
  "required_equipment" TEXT /* List of required equipment for facilities of this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_type_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_type_mapping_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_type_mapping_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the facility */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report relates to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, maintenance) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
